room for [0106,0001,0000]? [0200,0000]

HGSS.530.0035:
There is a mysterious notebook here.
Its age is impossible to tell.\f
“It was by pure chance that I obtained
information about the Pokémon ROTOM.\f
“Remarkably, ROTOM has the ability to
enter and merge with special motors.\f
“It’s now known that ROTOM can stay
inside a motor almost indefinitely.\f
“However, it will emerge if it enters a
Union Room or a Wi-Fi Club.\f
“ROTOM will also emerge from the motor
if it is left at the Day Care.\f
“ROTOM may also forget certain moves
when it leaves a motor.\f
“This Pokémon requires
exhaustive observation and analysis.\f
“To ensure I get all the credit,
my ROTOM research must be kept secret.\f
“They will come to revere me as the
scientific genius Char...”\f
The rest of the notebook is blank.
